summary: Comprehensive testing of DOMMMA V2 real estate marketplace platform completed successfully. All backend APIs working (100% success rate), frontend features functional with architectural design, role-based authentication, Google Maps integration, and Nova AI chatbot all working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Chat button has minor animation stability issues requiring force click

passed_tests: Property listings API with all filters (/api/listings)
Home page hero section with background image
Navigation menu (Home, About, Properties, Services, Contact)
Browse page property listings and Google Maps integration
Property filtering (bedrooms, bathrooms, price range, pet-friendly)
Property listing modal with Schedule Viewing and Save buttons
Nova AI chatbot modal and messaging
Dark teal color scheme and Cormorant Garamond typography

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major features working, minor UI animation issue)
